data.title: Migrate harvest-worktree.sh to read PRECONDITIONS via _read_latest_preconditions with graceful-degrade
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Update harvest-worktree.sh to source ticket-lib.sh and call `_read_latest_preconditions()` when a TICKET_ID is provided. Log the summary to stderr (never block on failure). Legacy tickets (zero events) degrade gracefully.

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh`

## Implementation Notes
1. After the successful merge (after "Worktree $WORKTREE_BRANCH merged successfully"), and before the final exit:
   - Source `ticket-lib.sh` (use `_PLUGIN_ROOT`-relative path via BASH_SOURCE resolution)
   - If `TICKET_ID` is set and non-empty, call `_read_latest_preconditions "$TICKET_ID" 2>/dev/null`
   - On success: log `[harvest] preconditions: manifest_depth=<value> gate_verdicts=<count>` to stderr
   - On failure or zero events: log `[harvest] preconditions: pre-manifest (no events for $TICKET_ID)` to stderr
   - Never fail-hard: wrap in `|| true`

## Legacy-ticket graceful-degrade contract
- `_read_latest_preconditions` returns exit 1 on zero events → log "pre-manifest", continue
- `_read_latest_preconditions` exits non-zero for any reason → log warning, continue (never block harvest)
- Log format must contain the word "preconditions" so tests can grep it

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh test_harvest_reads_preconditions_summary
- [ ] test_harvest_preconditions_zero_events_no_regression passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh test_harvest_preconditions_zero_events_no_regression
- [ ] `_read_latest_preconditions` call wrapped in `|| true` (no harvest failure on preconditions error)
  Verify: grep -q "read_latest_preconditions.*|| true\|true.*read_latest_preconditions" plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh || grep -A1 "_read_latest_preconditions" plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh | grep -q "|| true"
- [ ] All pre-existing harvest-worktree tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] Script is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
